_description: Acknowledged soft-FK drift recorded after Phase 1.4 runtime discovery. Each entry says: this check has known drift in this bucket; smoke exits 0 if observed drift is within the entry. Smoke exits 1 the moment new drift appears (NEW orphan value that doesn't match allow_values, OR observed count exceeds max_orphans).

_semantics.allow_values: Array of JS-style regex source strings. Any orphan pointer value matching ANY pattern is acknowledged. Use for drift whose pattern is stable (test-actor labels, system-generated IDs).
_semantics.max_orphans: Integer cap. Any orphan up to this count is acknowledged. Use for drift whose values are unpredictable but whose count is known and bounded (legacy content references, deleted-parent orphans).
_semantics.Both can coexist: If an entry has both, pattern-matching applies first; up to max_orphans of the remaining (unmatched) orphans are then acknowledged.
_semantics.Exit 0 rule: Across all checks, every observed orphan must be acknowledged.
_semantics.Tightening: When Phase 4/5 work reduces actual orphans, lower max_orphans or remove entries. Smoke will gently nag if observed is much lower than acknowledged.

buckets.test_actor: Test/eval/smoke session labels stamped into actor_id or created_by columns. Soft FKs are intentionally permissive on these columns. Harmless by design.
buckets.legacy_content: Dev-DB content tables (home_quotes, daily_reflections, homepage_featured) seeded against an older episode snapshot than the current episodes table. Cleanup belongs to operator reseed or Phase 5 legacy retirement.
buckets.phase4_guest: Stale guest-candidate pointers in khat_map_episode_candidates after guest candidates were deleted. Will be rationalised by Phase 4 guest unification.

allowed.note: eir_phase_transitions.actor_id — same actor labels stamped by transition writes.
episode_preparations.created_by — same labels seen in preparation writes.
collaboration_rooms.created_by — same labels seen in collab room writes.
discovery_runs.created_by — eval-runner used during P0 discovery baseline.
hybrid_topic_generations.created_by — eval-runner used during P0 hybrid baseline.
home_quotes.episode_id — 41 stale episode references from older content seed. Cleanup in Phase 5 (legacy retirement) or operator reseed.
daily_reflections.episode_id — same root cause as ep-3.
homepage_featured.episode_id — same root cause; 3 featured slots reference stale episodes.
khat_map_episode_candidates.suggested_guest_candidate_id — two candidates whose suggested guest candidate was deleted. Will be rationalised by Phase 4 guest unification.
